title: Stop Trading Fair Value Gaps Like This
description: Most traders misuse fair value gaps and wonder why they keep losing. Here are 3 rapid-fire fixes that funded traders already know. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT concepts that actually work.
script: 85% of traders using fair value gaps still blow their accounts. Because they're entering them all wrong. Tip one. Not every FVG is valid. Only trade gaps created by displacement — aggressive, one-sided price movement. Tip two. Wait for price to come back and react at the 50% level. That's where smart money actually sits. Tip three. Combine the FVG with a higher timeframe order block. That confluence is what funded traders live by. Fix those three things. Your entries change immediately. Follow R2F Trading for setups like this every day.
